input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 56 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 7, "message": "7 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 7, "message": "7 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 7, "message": "7 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 10, "message": "10 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 9, "message": "9 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "general", "count": 6, "message": "6 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 6, "message": "6 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 4, "message": "4 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": null, "current_utilization": 102, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: St. Michael's is expecting 56 incoming patients with critical clusters in respiratory, GI, cardiac, mental, and neuro requiring immediate protocol activation. Despite 102% current utilization, capacity is stable for the next 2 hours. To manage this high volume and maintain patient safety, consider diverting all CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, Toronto General, or Mount Sinai, all currently at 50% capacity.
